fr:title.text: Birkhoff’s representation theorem for distributive lattices

fr:frontmatter.fr:title: Birkhoff’s representation theorem for distributive lattices

fr:mainmatter.fr:p: The category of finite posets and monotone maps is anti-equivalent to the category of finite distributive lattices: a finite poset P is sent to the finite distributive lattice {\mathopen {}\left [P,{\mathopen {}\left [1\right ]\mathclose {}}\right ]\mathclose {}} of (decidable) downsets.
